alt: Hoatzin nest view displaying dense branch structure over water
caption: Hoatzin chicks possess remarkable reptile-like claws on their wing tips, allowing them to climb tree branches if they fall into the water.
acquisitionNotes: Curated hoatzin specimen depicting nesting and developmental habitat. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/94/Opisthocomus_hoazin_Chenchena_Hoatzin_%286555073507%29.jpg
